text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week, Grass Wonder, T.M. Opera
O—surrounded by all these powerful opponents,
Meisho Doto loses confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her lack of courage is offset by an
abundance of determination. She takes to the
turf, backed by a long history of persistent effort!
